summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 bug fixes: Multi-group support, Resource download with token auth, Message Teacher functionality, and VideoTile local video fix. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Settings page 'Join Another Group' card, Messages page teacher selection dropdown, and lesson resources with download buttons.

issues:
Console warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' - HTML nesting issue in resource list Badge component

passed_tests: Backend: Login returns group_ids array in user response
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns group_ids array
Backend: Resource download WITHOUT token returns 403
Backend: Resource download WITH token query param returns 200
Backend: GET /api/teachers returns teachers/admins for approved users
Backend: GET /api/teachers requires authentication (returns 401/403)
Backend: POST /api/groups/join endpoint exists and validates invite codes
Backend: POST /api/groups/join with valid code works (or returns 'already member')
Backend: GET /api/courses returns courses for user's groups
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/assign-group endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/groups/lookup verifies invite code
Backend: GET /api/groups/lookup with invalid code returns 404
Frontend: Login works with admin credentials
Frontend: Settings page shows 'Join Another Group' card with invite code input
Frontend: Settings page shows 'Join' button for group joining
Frontend: Messages page shows 'New Message' button
Frontend: Messages page 'Message a Teacher' modal opens with teacher dropdown
Frontend: Teacher dropdown shows available teachers (Shakira)
Frontend: Lesson page shows resources with download buttons
Frontend: Lesson page shows 3 resources (IMG_2531.jpeg, test2.pdf, test1.pdf)
Code Review: VideoTile useEffect guard fixed - line 24 allows local participant video
critical_code_review_comments: VideoTile fix verified: Line 24 'if (!isLocal && !sessionId) return;' correctly allows local participant video to render
FilePreview.jsx uses getAuthUrl() which appends token as query param - correct implementation
Settings.jsx has 'Join Another Group' card with groupsAPI.join() call - correct implementation
GET /api/teachers uses require_approved (not require_admin) - correct for all approved users
POST /api/groups/join uses $addToSet for group_ids - correct for multi-group support

Minor HTML nesting issue: Badge inside

tag in LessonDetail.jsx resource list (console warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) Multi-group: Users have group_ids array, login/auth/me return it, courses filtered by group_ids. (2) Resource download: Token auth via query param works, 403 without token. (3) Message Teacher: GET /api/teachers returns teachers for approved users, UI shows teacher dropdown in modal. (4) VideoTile: useEffect guard fixed to allow local participant video. Settings page has 'Join Another Group' card. Minor HTML nesting warning in LessonDetail.jsx (Badge inside

).

resource_download.frontend: FilePreview.jsx uses getAuthUrl() with token query param

message_teacher.ui_modal: Message a Teacher modal shows teacher dropdown

video_room.videotile_fix: useEffect guard 'if (!isLocal && !sessionId) return;' allows local video

settings_join_group.ui_card: Join Another Group card with invite code input
